task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (like nano, vim, or VS Code) or terminal output showing the contents of /home/ga/ecommerce-platform/docker-compose.yml.

task_completion.description: Ensure base services have no profiles assigned
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'postgres' and 'redis' service definitions in the docker-compose.yml file. They must NOT have a 'profiles:' attribute added to them.

task_completion.description: Add the frontend profile to nginx and storefront
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'nginx' and 'storefront' service definitions. They should have a 'profiles:' attribute that includes 'frontend' (e.g., profiles: ["frontend", "full"] or a YAML list).

task_completion.description: Add the backend profile to api and worker
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'api' and 'worker' service definitions. They should have a 'profiles:' attribute that includes 'backend'.

task_completion.description: Add the debug profile to test-runner and prometheus
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'test-runner' and 'prometheus' service definitions. They should have a 'profiles:' attribute that includes 'debug'.

task_completion.description: Add the full profile to all non-base services
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'nginx', 'storefront', 'api', 'worker', 'test-runner', and 'prometheus' service definitions. Every single one of these must ALSO include 'full' in their 'profiles:' attribute list.

integrity.description: Ensure existing configurations are not altered
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that 'image', 'ports', and 'depends_on' attributes for the services remain intact and have not been deleted or modified.

integrity.description: Ensure the correct file was modified
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path visible in the editor or terminal commands must be /home/ga/ecommerce-platform/docker-compose.yml, not a copy in a different directory.
Look for evidence of terminal commands (like sed/awk) or a text editor interface (nano, vim, gedit) being used to modify the file, rather than just hallucinating completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file is /home/ga/ecommerce-platform/docker-compose.yml. Base services 'postgres' and 'redis' must have NO 'profiles' attribute. The 'frontend' profile must be assigned to 'nginx' and 'storefront'. The 'backend' profile must be assigned to 'api' and 'worker'. The 'debug' profile must be assigned to 'test-runner' and 'prometheus'. The 'full' profile must be assigned to all services EXCEPT 'postgres' and 'redis'. Therefore, 'nginx', 'storefront', 'api', 'worker', 'test-runner', and 'prometheus' should each have a list of profiles containing their specific profile AND 'full' (e.g., profiles: ["frontend", "full"]). Existing port mappings, image names, and depends_on relations must remain unchanged.
